ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resorts" (
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resort */,
  "resort_name" TEXT /* Name of the resort */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the resort is located */,
  "city_village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or village where the resort is located */,
  "region_county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region or county where the resort is located */,
  "year_opened" INTEGER /* Year the resort was opened */,
  "added_to_portfolio_year" INTEGER /* Year the resort was added to the Center Parcs portfolio */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the resort's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the resort's location */,
  "total_accommodations" INTEGER /* Total number of accommodations available at the resort */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees working at the resort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resorts_region_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_county_id") REFERENCES regions_counties ("region_county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resorts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resorts_city_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_village_id") REFERENCES cities_villages ("city_village_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resort_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail entry */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort the detail belongs to */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of a significant event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "amenity_list" TEXT /* List of amenities offered at the resort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resort_details_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language(s) spoken in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities_villages" (
  "city_village_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city or village */,
  "city_village_name" TEXT /* Name of the city or village */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the city or village is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city or village */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city or village in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_village_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_counties" (
  "region_county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region or county */,
  "region_county_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or county */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the region or county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region or county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region or county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_additions" (
  "addition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio addition */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort that was added */,
  "added_year" INTEGER /* Year when the resort was added to the portfolio */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the addition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("addition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., recreational, leisure, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the event occurred */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., renovation, expansion, incident) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resort_amenity_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity offered at the resort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resort_amenity_mapping_amenity_id FOREIGN KEY ("amenity_id") REFERENCES amenities ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resort_amenity_mapping_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resort_event_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resort_event_mapping_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resort_event_mapping_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the employee */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the employee works */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the guest is staying */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the guest checked in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date the guest checked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guests_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guests_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the guest checks in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date the guest checks out */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room booked */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who wrote the review */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the department is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id")
)
